kpk-securitize.name: kpk Securitize
kpk-securitize.description: Borrow USDC against Securitize tokenised RWAs, including VBILL, STAC, and ACRED, with Securitize-managed compliant collateral vaults.

0xCf4846E0d8A8667c516B844EB72A4d6e743010.description:
Borrow USDC against VBILL, a Securitize-issued tokenised US Treasury fund. kpk curates this Euler market, while the issuer-governed compliant collateral vault preserves transfer restrictions and allows VBILL to be used as collateral on Euler. 

**Access**: Available to eligible, KYC-approved users.

Contact Securitize to complete onboarding, or reach out to kpk for guidance.

0x2Ff596321782FE034102f55af5ad707A4Ce0d6.description: Lend USDC directly in an isolated kpk-curated Euler vault where borrowers post VBILL, a Securitize-issued tokenised US Treasury fund, as collateral. Depositors earn yield from borrower interest.

0x1cFC56665c2718454e8dDf975dC37aF0bc68B5.description:
Borrow USDC against STAC, a Securitize-issued tokenised AAA CLO fund. kpk curates this Euler market, while the issuer-governed compliant collateral vault preserves transfer restrictions and allows STAC to be used as collateral on Euler.

**Access**: Available to eligible, KYC-approved users.

Contact Securitize to complete onboarding, or reach out to kpk for guidance.

0x8b2d7534Ffcf6c2a9226f439CDaC26c6666E97.description: Lend USDC directly in an isolated kpk-curated Euler vault where borrowers post STAC, a Securitize-issued tokenised AAA CLO fund, as collateral. Depositors earn yield from borrower interest.

0x33c57482EeDb4f81F86A693e8F0CE5D369819e.description:
Borrow USDC against ACRED, a Securitize-issued tokenised diversified credit fund. kpk curates this Euler market, while the issuer-governed compliant collateral vault preserves transfer restrictions and allows ACRED to be used as collateral on Euler.

**Access**: Available to eligible, KYC-approved users.

Contact Securitize to complete onboarding, or reach out to kpk for guidance.

0x75e2DAbcfb2edb0e63445ac9F027e3048508eA.description: Lend USDC directly in an isolated kpk-curated Euler vault where borrowers post ACRED, a Securitize-issued tokenised diversified credit fund, as collateral. Depositors earn yield from borrower interest.

sentora-ondo.name: Sentora Ondo Global Markets
sentora-ondo.description: A market for borrowing against Ondo tokenized equities and ETFs. Governed by Sentora.

sentora-rlusd.name: Sentora RLUSD
sentora-rlusd.description: A market for supplying and borrowing RLUSD against bluechip assets. Governed by Sentora.
